description_long: This modern bungalow is set within a fenced rectangular plot, featuring a flat roof and a clean, geometric facade. The front of the house is accented by large, vertically oriented windows and a double garage with a paved driveway. The backyard includes a circular above-ground pool, a shaded patio area with an umbrella, a children's play structure, and a small outbuilding or shed. The landscaping is lush, with several mature trees, manicured lawns, and a flower bed along the side fence. The property is enclosed by a white fence with a double gate at the front, and there is a water tank visible near the rear of the house. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor living spaces and a contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a double garage, and landscaped outdoor spaces including a pool, patio, and play area, all enclosed by a white fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, paved driveway, and symmetrical window arrangement with trees and a white fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, a parked car, and the rear garden area with a shed and water tank.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard amenities: circular pool, patio with umbrella, play structure, and lush landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain side wall, additional trees, and the expanse of the backyard with visible outbuildings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large vertical windows on the front facade
